label: Lobby (viewer)
description: An orbit / arc-rotate camera framing a model — how people inspect an object.

label: Atrium (first-person)
description: A walkable scene traversed with WASD + look — where people walk and what they approach.

label: Showcase (real glTF viewer)
description: An orbit camera framing a real glTF model (Khronos ToyCar) — inspecting a detailed PBR asset.

label: Gallery (walkable real models)
description: A first-person walkable room with real glTF models (Khronos ToyCar, Fox, GlamVelvetSofa) on pedestals — walk up and inspect or pick the exhibits.

label: Expanse (large multi-level world)
description: A first-person world ~10x larger than the atrium, with height differences (a ramp up to a raised overlook and a 3-floor tower) and far-apart landmarks. Walking between sections auto-switches the tracked scene id (setScene) — built to exercise ADR 0040 large-scene analytics: bounds-driven cell size, region drill-down, and coverage/cold-spots.
